channel.title: Frontion Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan Tests Torpedo on Indigenous Submarine, Boosting Defense Against China
item.description: Taiwan conducted its first torpedo test firing for a domestically-built submarine, marking a major milestone in efforts to strengthen deterrence against Chinese naval forces and protect critical sea lanes.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Peace Negotiator Arrives in Miami for US Talks
item.description: Ukrainian peace negotiator Rustem Umerov arrived in Miami for meetings with US officials as peace talks to end the war with Russia have stalled in recent months.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia Tightens Putin Security for Victory Day Over Ukraine Attack Fears
item.description: The Kremlin announced extra security measures for President Putin during May 9 Victory Day events amid concerns about potential Ukrainian attacks on the WWII anniversary celebrations.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Tells Banks to Halt Loans to US-Sanctioned Iranian Oil Refineries
item.description: Chinese regulators advised major lenders to suspend new loans to five refineries sanctioned by the US over ties to Iranian oil, signaling Beijing may be bowing to Washington pressure.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 US and Iran Edge Toward Limited Peace Deal
item.description: The United States and Iran are negotiating a temporary agreement to halt their war, with a draft framework that would stop the fighting but leave contentious issues unresolved. Tehran is reviewing US proposals as Trump pushes for a swift resolution.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 US Submarines Maintain Edge But China Closing Gap
item.description: The undersea domain remains America's last clear military advantage over China, but Beijing's submarine capabilities are rapidly improving as both nations expand their naval fleets.

item.title: 🇵🇰🇮🇳 Pakistan Warns of Strong Response on India Clash Anniversary
item.description: Pakistan's military warned of a strong response to any attack as it marks the anniversary of last year's conflict with India, heightening tensions between the nuclear-armed neighbors.

item.title: 🏛️ IOC Urges Sports to Allow Belarus Athletes Without Neutral Vetting
item.description: The International Olympic Committee says Belarusian athletes should compete with full national identity rather than being vetted for neutral status, marking a shift in post-Russia sanctions policy.

item.title: 🇭🇺 Hungarian Voters Split on Ukraine EU Bid as Magyar Party Opposes Aid
item.description: A new poll shows most voters of Hungarys opposition Tisza party oppose sending aid to Ukraine, while being divided on Kyivs EU accession bid, highlighting continued political tensions over Hungarys stance on the war.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇹🇷 Israel Aerospace Industries Distances Itself From Turkey Critic Shay Gal
item.description: Israeli defense company IAI stated that former employee Shay Gal no longer works there after he declared Turkey would become the next Iran, amid growing Israeli criticism of Turkeys regional stance.

item.title: 🇸🇦 Gulf States Derail Trump Air Access by Cutting Airspace and Bases
item.description: Saudi Arabia and other Gulf states have suspended US access to airbases and airspace for operations against Iran, dealing a major blow to Washingtons military options and signaling regional reluctance to escalate.

item.title: 💰 Global Debt Hits Record $353 Trillion as War and AI Drive Borrowing
item.description: A new report shows China and the US driving global debt to unprecedented levels, with Iran war pressures, AI infrastructure spending, and energy security pushes expected to increase borrowing further.

item.title: 🇪🇺🇨🇳 EU Cuts Funding for Green Projects Using Chinese Inverters, Drawing Beijing Rebuke
item.description: The European Union has eliminated funding for renewable energy projects using Chinese inverters, prompting Chinas commerce ministry to warn the move would backfire and harm European energy security.

item.title: 🚢 Maersk Warns Energy Crisis to Persist Even with Iran Peace Deal
item.description: Shipping giant Maersk reported fuel costs surged nearly $500 million monthly due to the Iran war, warning the energy crisis will continue even if a peace agreement is reached.

item.title: 🇨🇳 US Senators Urge Stability and Cooperation in Beijing Visit Ahead of Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: A delegation of US senators visiting China called for stability and peaceful cooperation between the world's two largest economies one week before the Trump-Xi bilateral meeting.

item.title: 🇵🇸 Israeli Strike Kills Son of Hamas Chief Negotiator in Gaza
item.description: An Israeli airstrike killed the son of Hamas' top negotiator as the militant group held talks in Cairo on safeguarding its truce with Israel, complicating US-mediated negotiations over Gaza's future.

item.title: 🛢️ Singapore Oil Product Stocks Hit Over Nine-Month Lows as Iran War Cuts Supply
item.description: Oil product stocks in Asia's trading hub Singapore fell to their lowest in more than nine months after the US-Iran war disrupted Middle East crude and fuel exports.

item.title: ⚽ Irish Footballers and Celebrities Urge Boycott of Israel Match
item.description: Leading Irish footballers joined celebrities in a campaign urging Ireland to boycott a UEFA Nations League match against Israel, accusing the country of genocide in Gaza.

item.title: 🇭🇰 Hong Kong Exchange Proposes Gold Futures as Geopolitical Volatility Drives Demand
item.description: HKEX plans to relaunch gold futures as the city pushes to become an international gold trading hub amid bullion price volatility driven by Iran war tensions.

item.title: 🇱🇻 Russian Drones Crash in Latvia, Damaging Oil Storage Facility
item.description: Two drones from Russian territory entered NATO member Latvia and crashed, damaging an oil storage facility, in an escalation of spillover from the Ukraine conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelenskiy Says Russia Continues to Violate Ukraine Ceasefire
item.description: President Zelenskiy says Russia continues to flout Kyiv-proposed ceasefire, warning Ukraine will continue long-range strikes if Russian assaults persist.

item.title: ⛪ Rubio Meets Pope Leo Amid Trump-Vatican Tensions Over Iran
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio met with Pope Leo at the Vatican in a fence-mending visit following Trump's repeated attacks on the pontiff over the Iran war.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China sentences two former defense ministers to death with reprieve for corruption
item.description: Former defense ministers Wei Fenghe and Li Shangfu received suspended death sentences for graft, in the latest high-profile anti-corruption purge targeting China's military leadership.

item.title: 🇬🇧🇪🇺 UK PM Starmer to seek even closer EU ties after reset deal
item.description: Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces pressure from MPs to go further than the reset deal as he battles to salvage his premiership, signaling deeper UK-EU integration ahead.

item.title: 🇹🇷🇨🇳 Turkey Togg partners with China CATL in first overseas EV chassis deal
item.description: Turkish EV maker Togg and Chinese battery giant CATL will jointly develop vehicles based on CATLs Panshi EV platform, marking the first overseas deployment of the Chinese chassis technology.
